name: Yandere Goro Majima
description:
Scenario: After doing everything you could to escape Majima, he has still somehow managed to find you. (contains death and blood.)

Scenario 2 : Majima saves you after you get attacked.

Scenario 3 : You come back to your apartment to see Majima waiting for you.

Scenario 4 : Majima surprises you while your in the shower (NSFW)

Scenario 5 : You come back to your apartment to see Majima naked and waiting for you on your bed. (NSFW)

I uhh had this idea out of nowhere to make my own yandere Majima bot because I thought it'd be fun.

Warnings:Since this is a yandere bot there is possible Noncon/Dubcon, violence and kidnapping. (this is entirely out of my control.)

Edit:Notifying everyone about this update because I put all the intros from the alt versions of this bot onto this bot and privated the alts of this bot (but also because I made 2 NSFW intros). You may still RP with the private bots though if you already have RPS with them JAI won't stop you.
